## Meeting Purpose

[Review strategy sprint pipeline and discuss upcoming events and outreach efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline review focused on confirming dates and prioritizing deals for September](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Standardized pricing strategy discussed: start at $15K, negotiate down to $12K if needed](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Upcoming dinner event (Sep 4) and Happy Hour (2 weeks later) planning in progress](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Team exploring new outbound tools (La Growth Machine, Lemlist) to enhance prospecting efforts](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Review and Prioritization

  - [Sep 2: Aiming to nudge Lovable towards this date; no current backups](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Sep 8: Bubble prioritized; Hyper Exponential and Logic as potential backups](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Sep 15: Enable and Clarify in procurement; Norm as backup](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Sep 22: VizCon in a strong position](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Sep 29: Multiple options available](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Pricing Strategy Discussion

  - [Team agreed to standardize starting price at $15K, negotiating down to $12K if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Exception for very small companies: may start at $12K](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Goal to avoid deals below $9K monthly](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### Upcoming Events Planning

  - [Dinner event on Sep 4: Targeting 20-25 attendees, mix of current customers and high-value prospects](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Happy Hour in 2 weeks: Open invite for director-level and above](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Team discussing how to leverage these events for pipeline growth](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Outbound Tools and Strategies

  - [Exploring new tools: La Growth Machine, Lemlist for email, text, and LinkedIn outreach](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Considering Reddit for starting conversations that could appear in AI searches](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Team encouraged to create and warm up Reddit accounts for future marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Metronome Account Update

  - [Company going on offsite next week to evaluate GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Pricing index project proposal under consideration](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Marcel aiming to speak with Chris (Head of Marketing) before the offsite](https://fathom.video/share/CK5tUUz-ZnnuUZeHhioy42cyZxXHo-6y?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
